title: What is Gendo
wikitext:
[]: What is Gendo?             Quote Post by viperzero » Thu Sep 01, 2016 11:43 pm So one thing I've always sort of wondered is, what exactly is Gendo's profession? I mean I know he is the commander of NERV but I mean what are his qualifications other then being well connected? Is he a Scientist? Engineer? He's defiantly not a solider of any kind. We see him in school but we never hear what he is studying. He's like 10 years older then Yui so maybe he was a Graduate student? No one ever calls him Dr Ikari so I guess he has a Masters at most. I know he was part of the original expedition to Antarctica so he has to have some kind of STEM background right? Then again he never takes the lead in the technical discussions so who knows. He does have the bubble chamber thing on his floor. What do you guys think?

[]: Re: What is Gendo?             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Sep 01, 2016 11:51 pm Actually, we don't ever see Gendo in school. In the flashback episode, he's introduced when he's bailed out of jail by Fuyutsuki for getting into a fight. Fuyutsuki doesn't hear much else about him until Yui mentions that she's been dating him, but IIRC, there's nothing that indicates that Gendo was enrolled and studying anything. It's entirely within the realm of possibilities he never went to college at all. The reason he holds such a high position is purely due to his connections. The series makes a point of this by suggesting that Gendo possibly got close to Yui in the first place because of her family's position with Seele; and when you're friends with Seele, you can have any job in the world. After Yui's "death", he remained valuable for his knowledge and ability to follow through with the Human Instrumentality Project. Seeing as HIP was Seele's number one goal, it makes sense that they would supply him with near-endless resources and authority to make it happen.

[]: Re: What is Gendo?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 01, 2016 11:56 pm The Classified Information says that Gendo was an "auditor" for the Katsuragi Expedition. Between that and some of the very few mundane administrative things we see Gendo doing in the show, it seems like his specialty is handling money. Episode 21 wrote: FUYUTSUKI: I did a thorough investigation of your assets. I'm sure raising a child is expensive, but isn't the amount rather large for you to have privately? IKARI: You impress me, Professor Fuyutsuki. Why not transfer to the department of economics ?

[]: Re: What is Gendo?             Quote Post by viperzero » Fri Sep 02, 2016 6:47 am I might be wrong but didn't Fututsuki get appointed his advisor? I might be misremembering that.

[]: Re: What is Gendo?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 02, 2016 12:42 pm Forum search doesn't let me look for thread titles just containing "Gendo", but I found this previous go-around -- viewtopic.php?t=8440 -- and I'm sure there must be others.

[]: Re: What is Gendo?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 03, 2016 1:26 pm Damn, I forgot all about that thread. Back to the drawing board, I guess!

[]: Re: What is Gendo?             Quote Post by Lavinius » Sun Sep 04, 2016 11:28 am A hero.

[]: Re: What is Gendo?             Quote Post by CommanderFish » Sun Sep 04, 2016 1:21 pm Lavinius wrote: A hero.
